article.title: Hiring at Uber ?
article.content:
I applied to Uber for two roles - SWE II, India — one on March 5, 2026, and another on April 8, 2026.
Both applications are still showing “in review.” 
Not sure how to interpret this — does it mean I’m still in consideration, or is it more like a passive hold/rejection that hasn’t been updated yet? Curious to hear from others who’ve been through Uber’s hiring process.
